title: agrostis tenuis f. aristata
intro: Agrostis tenuis f. aristata, also known as bentgrass or aristate bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Agrostis tenuis f. aristata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Agrostis tenuis f. aristata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
